questions.question: What is the primary objective of using frequency domain filtering for periodic noise reduction in images?
questions.hint: Frequency domain filtering aims to separate the image into its constituent frequencies, allowing for the removal of periodic noise.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the effects of low-pass and high-pass filters on periodic noise reduction in images.
questions.hint: Please provide a detailed comparison of the effects of both low-pass and high-pass filters on periodic noise reduction.

questions.question: A noisy image with a periodic pattern has a frequency spectrum that peaks at 30 Hz. What type of filter would be most effective in reducing this noise, and why?
questions.hint: Please specify the type of filter and explain its rationale.
